Document:
[color=#ffff00][head=3]Section 7: Point of Interest and Safe Zone Rules[/head][/color]
[color=#a4885c]7.1[/color]Under no circumstances should a Point of Interest be intentionally disabled or destroyed without a specific purpose or an order from a member of Command or an Admin. ★
[color=#a4885c]7.2[/color]Venmar Station and Medical Dispatch are categorized as Safe Zones. While in a Safe Zone, you must not use any explosives or destructive devices, or fire your ship guns. [color=#f1c232]★★[/color]
- [color=#a4885c]7.2A[/color] A 512m area around the Safe Zone stations is also considered a Safe Zone.
- [color=#a4885c]7.2B[/color] Do not flee to Safe Zones purely to avoid consequences for antagonistic actions.
- [color=#a4885c]7.2C[/color] Do not engage in large construction projects within Safe Zones.
- [color=#a4885c]7.2D[/color] During the first 6 hours of a shift, Faction Bases (Auric Outpost etc.) are categorized as Safe Zones.
[color=#a4885c]7.3[/color] Antagonistic actions such as murders, attacks, and thefts are to be handled IC. Major damage such as bombings or station destruction will be handled by an Admin. [color=#f1c232]★★[/color]
[color=#a4885c]7.4[/color] Do not steal anything from a Point of Interest that is critical to its function. ★
[color=#a4885c]7.5[/color] If you've participated in a raid upon LPB or Sevatapol, please give a minimum of 3 shifts before you rush for the content again. This is to give other players a chance to experience the content. After 8 hours into the shift, this embargo is lifted. [color=#f1c232]★★[/color]
